file_name: Service Stream - RiE - Acquisitions register questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Service Stream and RiE are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition. OFFICIAL SENSITIVE
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Service Stream and/or RiE.
